email.security.expires_soon: This code expires soon. If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.

footer.data_notice: shows real project data only: unavailable live values are shown as Syncing, Offline, Pending launch, or Not available yet.
footer.default_blurb: SHA-256 home solo mining, nano miner friendly, solo pools only.
social.aria_discord: Visit HobbyHash Coin on Discord (opens in a new tab)
social.aria_facebook: Visit HobbyHash Coin on Facebook (opens in a new tab)
social.aria_telegram: Visit HobbyHash Coin on Telegram (opens in a new tab)
social.aria_x: Visit HobbyHash Coin on X (opens in a new tab)
social.contact_blurb: Updates, mining tips, and community chat on our official channels.
mining_steps.step1.body: Create a web wallet or download the Windows wallet.
mining_steps.step1.title: Get a wallet
mining_steps.step2.body: Generate a HOBC address and use it before the dot in your worker name.
mining_steps.step2.title: Point your miners
mining_steps.step3.body: Connect to the main or nano solo pool and start hashing.
mining_steps.step3.title: Mine blocks
mining_steps.tagline: Create a wallet, point your miner, and start finding blocks. It's that simple.
mining_steps.title: Three steps to solo mining
pool_stats.chart.diff_sub: Best sdiff hit in the last 5m / 30m / 60m
pool_stats.chart.progress_sub: Best share relative to current network diff (reference only)
pool_stats.foot.source_value: HOBC ckpool share logs + local node RPC
pool_stats.luck_note.default: Waiting for enough live stats to calculate odds.
pool_stats.section.blocks.sub: Most recent blocks recorded by the logger.
pool_stats.section.blocks.title: Blocks Found
pool_stats.section.graphs.sub: These graphs use the collector's rolling windows plus browser-side history. Leave the page open for a longer local trace.
pool_stats.section.graphs.title: Live Graphs
pool_stats.section.leaderboard.sub: Fastest, luckiest, cleanest, hottest, and most loyal miners at a glance.
pool_stats.section.leaderboard.title: Miner Leaderboard
pool_stats.section.luck.sub: Estimated time and odds use current pool hashrate vs network difficulty. It is probability, not a promise, but it gives the dashboard its pulse.
pool_stats.section.luck.title: Luck Engine / Time To Hit
pool_stats.section.network.title: Network / Block Info
pool_stats.section.sessions.sub: Session resets after a miner goes quiet for a few hours, then starts fresh on the next share. All-time totals stay beside it.
pool_stats.section.sessions.title: Miner Sessions
pool_stats.subtitle: The full public HobbyHash Coin dashboard: time-to-hit odds, block reward, best-share progress, miner sessions, all-time totals, share-difficulty hits, and 5m / 60m / 12h graph windows.
pool_stats.subtitle_nano: The full public HobbyHash Coin nano dashboard: time-to-hit odds, block reward, best-share progress, miner sessions, all-time totals, share-difficulty hits, and 5m / 60m / 12h graph windows.
pool_stats.title: HOBC Solo Pool Stats Overload
wallet.custodial_notice.body: The HOBC web wallet is custodial. The website controls wallet keys and funds until you withdraw. Service downtime, operator security, or server compromise can affect access to funds.
wallet.custodial_notice.label: Custodial risk notice:
wallet.windows_standalone.body: The Windows standalone wallet is a local HOBC wallet you install on your PC. It is the better choice for larger balances, mining payouts you plan to hold, and long-term storage. Download it from the official downloads page and verify the SHA256 checksum before installing.
wallet.windows_standalone.heading: Windows standalone wallet
wallet.error.admin_hold: Your wallet is currently on administrative hold. Please contact support.
wallet.error.auth_sms_send: Password accepted, but SMS verification could not be sent. Please try again.
wallet.error.password_min_length: New password must be at least 12 characters.
wallet.error.register_disabled: Public wallet signups are temporarily disabled.

wallet.footer.blurb: Custodial wallet for convenient HOBC deposits and withdrawals.
wallet.footer.notice: Custodial wallet. Do not store large balances. No fake balances, deposits, withdrawals, or txids are shown.
wallet.footer.title: HOBC Web Wallet
wallet.meta.description: HobbyHash Coin custodial web wallet account area for HOBC deposits, withdrawals, and wallet security.
wallet.page.dashboard.no_receive: No receive wallet has been created yet.
wallet.page.dashboard.title: Dashboard

wallet.page.deposit.title: Receive HOBC

wallet.page.forgot_password.title: Lost Password
wallet.page.login.title: Login

wallet.page.reset_password.step_auth: Step 3: this account chose to enable authenticator security. Enter a current authenticator code to complete recovery.

wallet.page.security.scan_qr: Scan this QR code, then enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
